quickstart.title: Bilibili Danmaku Quickstart
quickstart.subtitle: Set up real-time Bilibili live stream danmaku monitoring in a few steps.
quickstart.steps.room.title: 1. Set Room ID
quickstart.steps.room.body: Enter your target Bilibili live room number and click Switch Room.
quickstart.steps.connect.title: 2. Connect
quickstart.steps.connect.body: Click Start Listening to connect to the danmaku server.
quickstart.steps.settings.title: 3. Configure Push Interval
quickstart.steps.settings.body: Adjust how often danmaku is pushed to AI (5-180 seconds).
quickstart.steps.login.title: 4. Login (Optional)
quickstart.steps.login.body: Login with your Bilibili account to unlock advanced features like sending danmaku and level-based filtering.
quickstart.tips.title: Tips
quickstart.tips.0: Guest mode can receive danmaku but cannot send or use advanced filters.
quickstart.tips.1: Background LLM can automatically summarize danmaku with AI.
quickstart.tips.2: The danmaku feed updates in real-time on the panel.
